creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
It looks like the mastersite has been rearranged. glade is now under
gnat/3.12p/glade instead of gnat/glade.

Fix: 

Change the MASTER_SITES line from 
MASTER_SITES=   ftp://cs.nyu.edu/pub/gnat/glade/
to
MASTER_SITES=   ftp://cs.nyu.edu/pub/gnat/${PORTVERSION}/glade/
How-To-Repeat: Try a make fetch or make checksum without the file in
/usr/ports/distfiles.
